name: No-Crust Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the sugar and flour with the egg until well combined.
2. Gradually add the cinnamon, nutmeg, baking powder, vanilla extract, and salt, stirring continuously to ensure even distribution.
3. Gently fold in the chopped nuts and apples into the mixture.
4. Transfer the filling into a greased 9-inch pie plate, spreading it evenly.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Allow the pie to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
